mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(file_id) AS CNT FROM IMAGE_FILE WHERE file_id = #{fileId}

SELECT S.id AS s_id , S.title AS s_title , S.manufacturer AS s_manufacturer , S.file_id AS s_file_id , F.file_url AS f_file_url , S.price AS s_price , S.view_count AS s_view_count , S.released_at AS s_released_at , S.created_at AS s_created_at , S.updated_at AS s_updated_at , I.id AS i_id , I.name AS i_name FROM GACHA_SERIES S LEFT JOIN IMAGE_FILE F ON F.file_id = S.file_id LEFT JOIN GACHA_ITEM I ON I.series_id = S.id WHERE S.id = #{seriesId} ORDER BY S.created_at DESC, I.created_at ASC
